title: Strategy Game Modes for Testing App

modes.name: Exam Arena
modes.description: Players compete through rounds of mixed difficulty questions.

modes.name: Time Attack
modes.description: Solve as many problems as possible within a fixed time window.

modes.name: Boss Battle
modes.description: Defeat a 'boss' by answering several questions correctly in a row.

modes.name: Strategy Lab
modes.description: Players practice elimination, backsolving, and estimation strategies.
